name: R5PeriodElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 Period to FHIR R4 Period
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 Period to FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Element `Period.start` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Period.start` as `Equivalent`.
If the low element is missing, the meaning is that the low boundary is not known.

Element `Period.start` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Period.start` as `Equivalent`.
If the low element is missing, the meaning is that the low boundary is not known.

Element `Period.end` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Period.end` as `Equivalent`.
The end value includes any matching date/time. i.e. 2012-02-03T10:00:00 is in a period that has an end value of 2012-02-03.

Element `Period.end` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Period.end` as `Equivalent`.
The end value includes any matching date/time. i.e. 2012-02-03T10:00:00 is in a period that has an end value of 2012-02-03.
